name: mimikatz
title: mimikatz
summary: Uses admin rights on Windows to display passwords in plaintext
description:
Uses admin rights on Windows to display passwords in plaintext
Mimikatz uses admin rights on Windows to display passwords of currently logged
in users in plaintext.

commands.name: mimikatz
commands.description: > [1;4mmimikatz[0m ~ [3mUses admin rights on Windows to display passwords in plaintext[0m
